hero.subtitle: Swishos delivers a unified, AI-native platform for B2B supply chain and quick commerce — supported by the infrastructure, security, and talent needed to run it at scale.

ai.customDesc: LLMs embedded across the platform to automate workflows and support decision-making.

bot.botGreeting: Hello! How can SwishOS help you scale today?
bot.botReply: I'm a demo bot! In production, I'll connect to the SwishOS AI Agent network to resolve this.

featuresPage.heroSubtitle: Engineered for speed, built for scale. Discover the capabilities powering the next generation of B2B commerce.
featuresPage.agenticDesc: Autonomous agents chase exceptions, resolve short-ships, and communicate with suppliers without human intervention.
featuresPage.ledgerDesc: A single source of truth for inventory and invoicing, seamlessly integrated with your existing ERPs and accounting tools.

visionPage.heroSubtitle: We believe that within five years, manual supply chain management will be obsolete. SwishOS is building the autonomous backbone of global trade.
visionPage.contentP1: The modern supply chain is a web of isolated systems, spreadsheets, and reactive decisions. We envisioned a different reality: a unified operating system where AI agents manage the micro-decisions of procurement, routing, and reconciliation.
visionPage.contentP2: By embedding Large Language Models directly into the fulfillment ledger, SwishOS transforms static software into an active participant. It negotiates, it reroutes, and it learns. This is not just a tool; it is the new standard for B2B distribution.

contactPage.successMessage: Thank you for reaching out. A SwishOS representative will contact you shortly.
contactPage.placeholderMessage: How can we help you scale?
